description: Deathbed declaration of a druggist (ʿaṭṭār). Location: Fustat. Dated: middle third of Tammuz 1555 Seleucid = June 1244 CE. Abū Naṣr Elʿazar b. Abū l-Ḥasan signs over to his employee Barakāt b. Yeshuʿa Ibn al-Mūrid the running of his drug store, fixing daily wages for him, and protecting him from future claims even by the declarant's own heirs. No signatures. Verso has various jottings. (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, V, pp. 136, 543)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
